title: ENNOLIFE SARS-CoV-2 Antigen Test Kit Protocol
steps: Keyin Patient IDs then press “START” to check the connection of Analyzer and Notebook. Three green light means connection is successful.

For specimen collection of nasal swabs, follow the CDC Swab Collection Guidelines and swab manufacturers' recmommandations. Use a flocked tapered swab. Tilt patient’s head back 70 degrees. While gently rotating the swab, insert swab less than one inch (about 2 cm) into nostril (until resistance is met at turbinates). Rotate the swab several times against nasal wall and repeat in other nostril using the same swab.

Place and soak the Patient Swab into the Tube R1 (extraction buffer). Rotate and stir up and down the swab for 15 secs then standing for 1 min. 00:01:15 Mix Tube R1 for several times by swab and discard the swab in biohazard waste.
Transfer solution 100 µL, from Tube R1 to the Tube R2.
Mix Tube R2 by a vortex mixer. 1500 rpm, 25 °C, 10 seconds Make sure all beads are suspended well.
Insert Tube R2 into carrier of vortex mixer and mix for 15 min. 1500 rpm, 25 °C, 15 minutes
Spin down Tube R2. 5000 rpm, 25 °C, 10 seconds Insert Tube R2 into Magnetic Rack and stand for 30 secs. 00:00:30
Remove supernantant of Tube R2. Attention, do not remove any magnetic beads.
Add 1000 uL Wash Buffer to Tube R2. 1000 µL, Wash buffer Mix for 10 secs by a vortex mixer. 1500 rpm, 25 °C, 10 seconds
Spin down Tube R2 for 10 secs. 5000 rpm, 25 °C, 10 seconds Insert Tube R2 into Magnetic Rack and stand for 30 secs. 00:00:30
Remove supernantant of Tube R2. Attention, do not remove any magnetic beads.
Transfer solution 100 µL, from Tube R3 to the Tube R2. Mix for 10 secs by a vortex mixer. 1005 rpm, 25 °C, 10 seconds
Transfer 100 µL, from Tube R2 (including beads) into the Reagent Disc.
On the Mainpage of the Analyzer (1) Select “Measurement”. (2) Select “Swab”. (3) Select “START”.
After 10 mins, software will show the results. 00:10:00
Make sure ENNOLIFE Clinical Chemistry Analyzer and Notebook was connected according to the operation manual. Double click "ENNOLIFE COVID-19 software" shortcut from the desktop.
While waiting, open pounch and setup the reagent disc into holder. Install the holder on the Analyzer.
creator: ch_yu
